The Story

Real Italian.
For everyone.

Donatello Montrone grew up in southern Italy — food made with care, shared with generosity, never out of reach.

After years in the Philippines, he saw a gap: authentic Italian food existed, but it was expensive, inconsistent, or both. He built Al Dente to fix that. Fresh, traditional, affordable. For everyone.

La Nostra Pasta

Made fresh.
Every morning.

Every day starts with flour, eggs and time. Our pasta is made in-house, shaped for each sauce, and cooked al dente to keep the texture alive.

Carbonara, cacio e pepe, ragu, pesto, seafood and seasonal specials all begin with the same rule: simple ingredients, proper technique, no shortcuts.

"Great Italian food should be for everyone — not just a lucky few. Fresh, traditional, affordable. That's the whole idea."
— Donatello Montrone, Founder & Chef · Al Dente Food Group, BGC 2024

The Space

Alive.
Not static.

DJ Nights Aperitivo Two Floors Open Kitchen Forbestown BGC

Expats, young professionals, date nights, groups — all in the same room, same energy. Music, aperitivo, DJ nights on weekends.

Events

Private dinners.
Group nights.

Birthdays Company dinners Aperitivo DJ nights Groups of 8+

Two floors, an open kitchen, a bar room and terrace energy in Forbestown BGC. For birthdays, team dinners, brand nights or private gatherings, we can help shape the menu around the group.

La Nostra Pasta

Fresh cuts.
Every day.

We make pasta in-house every morning and match each shape with the sauce it holds best. Long, short, ridged, delicate or handmade: the cut matters because texture changes the whole plate.

Pasta Lunga

Long cuts

Spaghetti

The classic long cut. Clean bite, perfect tension, built for iconic sauces.

Best with Carbonara · Pomodoro · Scoglio

Pappardelle

Wide ribbons with a generous surface, made for rich and slow-cooked sauces.

Best with Ragu · Meat sauces

Tagliolini

Thin, elegant strands with a delicate texture and quick sauce absorption.

Best with Cacio e Pepe · Light sauces

Linguine

Flat long pasta with more grip than spaghetti, especially good with seafood.

Best with Scoglio · Pesto · Aligue

Pasta Corta

Short cuts

Rigatoni

Large ridged tubes that catch sauce inside and outside every bite.

Best with Carbonara · Ragu · Amatriciana

Conchiglie

Shell-shaped pasta that scoops creamy sauces and small ingredients beautifully.

Best with Aligue · Pesto · Creamy sauces

Gigli

Flower-like curls with folds that hold texture, cheese and thicker sauces.

Best with Pesto · Ragu · Pomodoro

Orecchiette

Small ears with a firm bite, ideal for rustic sauces and vegetables.

Best with Sausage ragu · Vegetables

House Specialty

Made in-house

Gnocchi Della Casa

Soft house-made gnocchi with a comforting bite and a rich sauce finish.

Best with rich meat sauce

Choose the cut. Choose the sauce.
We cook it al dente.
